description: Statement of payments to a tenant of the Qodesh, ca. 1160. A certain al-Nadiv, otherwise known as the perfume maker, tenant of a compound partly owned by the qodesh known as al-Burj, receives several sums from the funds of the qodesh. This money is to be used for completing repairs in his apartment and some others. The statement is in the hand of the judge Mevorakh b. Natan. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 289 #60)
description_he: הצהרת תשלומים לשוכר הקדש, כ-1160: אל-נדיב, המכונה הבשמי, שוכר בנין (אל-בורג'), מקבל סכומים מכספי ההקדש לתיקונים בדירתו ובאחרות. בכתב השופט מבורך בן נתן.
